title: 6 Pack Pest Trap Boards, Strong Sticky Trap Pad And Boards For Multi Pests, Glue Trap Pads for Indoor Outdoor Home Kitchen Garden, Non- Toxic. Fly Catchers. (6)
bullet_points: Contain: 6-Pack Pest Sticky Glue Boards Keep your home pest-free. Size: 21cm x 31cm. Evenly distributed. Making it easier to catch Pests

Easy to use: Just separate the two boards, put some baits on the middle of pest glue traps indoor and place the sticky pest trap along a wall where pest like to travel and they are ready to go. For example: peanut butter, fruit, meat, cookies, cheese, sausage

Good material: These pest glue traps are made of thicker and harder cardboard which can prevent being dragged away by big pest. It can avoid being touched by children or pets, especially suitable for the placement in narrow space.

Use: This pest traps are an effective way to trap insects. Trapping pest / spiders/cockroaches/flies/bugs/stink bugs and other pests. It can be used in kitchen, office, bedroom, garden, restroom, restaurant, indoors, outdoors.
While keeping your home tidy, clean and healthy.
